summary: Iteration 6 testing: Revenue exclusions feature and PDF report generation fully verified. Backend 13/13 tests passed. Frontend all flows working correctly - PDF button in Dashboard header, revenue transaction deletion creates exclusions with correct type/sub_type, excluded transactions section displays Type badge (Revenu/Dépense).
critical_code_review_comments: PDF Report Endpoint: Good implementation using reportlab. Generates valid PDF with KPI summary, expenses breakdown, and transactions list. Content-Disposition header correctly set for download.
ExcludedRecurringExpense Model: Now supports both 'expense' and 'revenue' types with optional sub_type field for 'members'/'coaching'.
delete_transaction: Properly extracts type and sub_type from original transaction before creating exclusion record.
TransactionsPage: Excluded section displays Type badge with appropriate styling (green for Revenu, blue for Dépense). Sub-type also shown (e.g., 'Revenu · coaching').
Dashboard PDF Button: Correctly placed in header with data-testid='export-pdf-btn'. Opens PDF endpoint in new tab with current selected month.
seed_data_creation: Test transactions created and cleaned up during testing. Restored 'Boot Camp Holiday' transaction after testing exclusion flow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features verified in iteration 6: (1) DELETE /api/transactions/{id} now saves type and sub_type to ExcludedRecurringExpense collection. (2) GET /api/report/pdf/{month} returns valid PDF (~4KB) with Content-Type: application/pdf and Content-Disposition: attachment. Returns 404 for non-existent months. (3) TransactionsPage shows Type column in excluded section with badges: 'Revenu' (green), 'Dépense' (blue), with sub_type when present (e.g., 'Revenu · members', 'Revenu · coaching'). (4) Dashboard has PDF button [data-testid='export-pdf-btn'] that opens /api/report/pdf/{selectedMonth} in new tab. (5) Toast confirms 'Transaction supprimée - Ajoutée aux exclusions' on delete.

features_tested.pdf_valid_format: PASS - Response starts with %PDF magic bytes
features_tested.pdf_reasonable_size: PASS - PDF is ~4KB (reasonable for monthly report)
features_tested.delete_revenue_creates_exclusion_with_ty: PASS - Deleted revenue transaction has type='revenue' in exclusions
features_tested.delete_expense_creates_exclusion_with_ty: PASS - Deleted expense transaction has type='expense' in exclusions
features_tested.excluded_section_shows_type_badge: PASS - Type column shows 'Revenu · coaching' badge
features_tested.pdf_button_in_dashboard: PASS - PDF button visible in Dashboard header
features_tested.pdf_button_clickable: PASS - Button is enabled and interactive
